U. D. CASE P/T JUDGE MICHELLE BRANT, RPT. JACKIE CHAN, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. ARNOLD EVJE DEFTS. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C SETTL. CONF. ALL PRESENT. STIP. JUDGMNT. PLTF. TO HAVE RESTIT. OF PREMISESS 2590 THIRD ST. UNIT B, SFCA 94107. RENTAL AGREEMNT. IS FORFEITED. RENT $2,879.68. PLTF. WAIVES RENT IF DEFT. VACATES BY 9/17/94, 5PM. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY TIL 9/17/94, 5PM. PERSONAL PROPERTY IS ABANDONED. EACH SIDE WAIVES COSTS AND ATTY. FEES. EACH SIDE RELEASES THE OTHER FROM ANY OTHER CLAIMS. THERE IS NO OTHER OCCUPANT. NO FURTHER STAY. IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY PLTF. WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. SEC. DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED.
